repoURL.description: The URL of the GitHub repository.

branch.description: The branch to operate on. Revisions in the range base..branch (exclusive base, inclusive HEAD) will be replayed as GitHub-signed revisions.

base.description: The exclusive base of the revision range. All revisions after this one up to the branch HEAD will be replayed as GitHub-signed revisions. Typically set from a prior step's output, e.g. ${{ outputs.clone.commits.main }}.

insecureSkipTLSVerify.description: Indicates whether to skip TLS verification when communicating with the GitHub API. Default is false.
